name: Statute of Limitations for Utah Hearing Claims

mainEntity.name: What statute of limitations for filing Utah occupational hearing loss comp?
mainEntity.text: What statute of limitations for filing Utah occupational hearing loss comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: One year from date of injury (last exposure) or three years from accident per Utah Code §34A-2-207, with 180-day report prerequisite.

suggestedAnswer.text: Hearing claims use 'last exposure' rule; extensions rare. File promptly post-report. Multi-year gaps risk denial. Centerville attorneys track for clients, ensuring compliance amid confusion.[4]

description: One year from date of injury (last exposure) or three years from accident per Utah Code §34A-2-207, with 180-day report prerequisite.
